name: Packeteer, Inc.
description: Packeteer, Inc. was a prominent technology company based in Cupertino, California, that specialized in wide area network (WAN) application optimization and bandwidth management. Founded in 1996, the company provided an integrated family of appliances and software products designed to bridge the gap between critical business applications and IP networks. By offering an intelligent overlay of technologies, Packeteer enabled organizations to control data traffic, prioritize web access, and improve overall network performance. The company was publicly traded on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol PKTR before being acquired by Blue Coat Systems in 2008.
